visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman in a blue denim hoodie sits at a light wood table, leaning her chin on a small potted succulent. Behind her, a man in a white tank top stands with a mischievous smile, holding a red foam bat. The background features white shelves filled with various character dolls, a large lucky cat figure, and a wooden sign. The lighting is bright and even studio light. (2) The camera remains static as the woman smiles broadly, pointing towards the camera as on-screen graphics appear. The man behind her playfully prepares to swing the red bat. The shelves in the background remain visible, showcasing a collection of colorful toys and decorative items. (3) The scene transitions through several takes where the man hits the woman's head playfully with the foam bat while she laughs and covers her head. A second woman in a black vest and white shirt enters from the left, placing her hands on her hips with a stern expression, confronting the duo at the table. (4) The visual switches to a close-up of a smartphone held in the woman's hands. The screen displays the Shopee app interface, showing a feed of short videos including a cat playing with a toy and a demonstration of wall-mounted tissue boxes. (5) Returning to the woman in the blue jacket, she holds the smartphone up, pointing at the screen and explaining the content to the camera. Bright yellow text overlays appear around her. The man is still visible in the background, listening. (6) The phone screen is shown again, navigating to the hahababy brand store page on Shopee, showing product listings for bags and accessories. The woman's hands are visible interacting with the touchscreen, scrolling through the items.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Slogan]: POV：不能講髒話. (2) [Variety]: 第一題. [Subtitle]: ㄎㄎ. (3) [Subtitle]: 靠... 靠... 3 2 1 不行啦 下一題 下一題 下一題 下一題 快點. (4) [Variety]: 第二題. [Subtitle]: ㄎㄧ. 這很簡單吧. (5) [Subtitle]: 3 2 白... 白癡哦. 下一個 來來來. (6) [Variety]: 第三題. [Subtitle]: ㄍㄋㄋ. ㄍㄋㄋ是什麼? 幹ㄍㄋㄋ?? (7) [Subtitle]: 跟你看 你東西沒了 可以跟你拿嘛 對不對 下一個 下一個. (8) [Variety]: 第四題. [Subtitle]: ㄋㄇㄉ. 你你你你. (9) [Subtitle]: 你買東西 你買的 你買的 你買的 你買的. (10) [Subtitle]: 欸不是 你們到底是在上班 還是在玩遊戲啊. 我們邊上班啊 邊玩遊戲 邊拍短影音啊. (11) [Slogan]: 拍那麼多短影音 除了流量 還可以幹嘛. (12) [Subtitle]: 哎 那是因為你沒有用 蝦皮分潤計畫. 蝦皮購物呢 推出全新功能 蝦皮短影音. 無論你是賣家 還是一般用戶 都能在蝦皮上 發布短影音. (13) [Subtitle]: 只要透過影片 內嵌的連結 導單成功 就有機會享 15% 以上的分潤金. 24 小時 隨時隨地 都可以上傳 蝦皮加碼輕鬆拿哦!!. (14) [Logo]: hahababy. (15) [Subtitle]: 我們 hahababy 都會放 消費者看我們介紹商品 喜歡就能 直接加入購物車. 你這樣邊看邊買 購物&娛樂 同時滿足. (16) [Variety]: \一起加入蝦皮分潤計畫/. [Slogan]: JEBAA4E.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main creator in blue, 1 male support in white tank top, 1 female supervisor in black vest.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The main woman has dark hair in twin buns and wears a light blue denim hoodie.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: An office or studio space with shelves containing character figurines, a large lucky cat statue, and various colorful merchandise. The second background is a mobile app interface.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) Energetic female voice speaks in Traditional Chinese with a high pitch and fast tempo, sounding excited. Upbeat, high-energy pop BGM with a strong electronic beat and synthesizer melody begins. A ding SFX occurs as text appears on screen. (2) A male voice enters, counting down 3, 2, 1 in a playful, loud tone. The sound of a foam bat hitting a head is heard as a soft, hollow thud SFX. The BGM continues steadily at around 128 BPM. (3) A new female voice speaks with a lower pitch and more authoritative, stern tone, sounding like a boss. The original female voice responds with a slightly higher, defensive but humorous tone. The background music remains constant, bridging the dialogue. (4) Professional narrative-style voiceover begins, explaining the Shopee Short Video feature. The articulation is very clear and enunciated. The BGM volume ducks slightly to accommodate the clear speech but maintains the rhythmic drive. (5) Various UI-related sound effects, such as pops and whooshes, are layered over the narration to emphasize the transitions on the smartphone screen. The BGM continues with its consistent electronic drum pattern and synth chords. (6) The video concludes with the primary female speaker's enthusiastic call to action. A final sparkle SFX marks the appearance of a referral code on screen. The music reaches a crescendo and ends with a sharp cut.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Complication -> Product Solution -> Call to Action
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote the Shopee affiliate sharing program and its new short video feature by demonstrating how everyday content creators can earn commissions through product links in a humorous workplace setting.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video explicitly demonstrates the Shopee app, features a brand store (hahababy), and provides a specific referral code for the affiliate program.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video effectively blends social media meme trends (the POV/No Cursing challenge) with a commercial message, creating high engagement before pivoting to the tutorial content.
